messages.content:
Dear Guest, 

Greetings on behalf of SpiceJet. 

A survey link was sent to you a few days back. We would request you to participate by clicking the link below:

https://www.surveymonkey.com/s.aspx?sm=kbVmOlyeQHjHwOUuuO2fHw_3d_3d
 

This link is uniquely tied to this survey and your email address. Please do not forward this message.

In case you wish to write to us please send in a reply to custrelations@spicejet.com . 

This survey is conducted every month and if you have participated in the last survey you may choose not to participate. 

Please note: If you do not wish to receive further emails from us, please click the link below, and you will be automatically removed from our mailing list. 
https://www.surveymonkey.com/optout.aspx?sm=kbVmOlyeQHjHwOUuuO2fHw_3d_3d


We look forward to your particiaption.

Thanks and Regards, 
SpiceJet Customer Services. 

Toll Free : 1800-180-3333 
Mobile    : 0987-180-3333. 
Fax No.   : 0124-3913853. 
Email     :custrelations@spicejet.com 
Website   : http://www.spicejet.com

Dear Guest, 

Greetings on behalf of SpiceJet. 

We thank you for flying with SpiceJet. In our continuous effort to enhance our services, we look forward to your suggestions and recommendations. 

We would like to request you to participate in a feedback survey about SpiceJet's services. 

Please click on the link below to give us a feedback 
https://www.surveymonkey.com/s.aspx?sm=kbVmOlyeQHjHwOUuuO2fHw_3d_3d
 

This link is uniquely tied to this survey and your email address. Please do not forward this message.

In case you wish to write to us please reply to custrelations@spicejet.com . 

This survey is conducted every month and if you have participated in the last survey you may choose not to participate. 

Please note: If you do not wish to receive further emails from us, please click the link below, and you will be automatically removed from our mailing list. 
https://www.surveymonkey.com/optout.aspx?sm=kbVmOlyeQHjHwOUuuO2fHw_3d_3d


Thanks for your participation! 

We look forward to having you on board again in future. 

Thanks and Regards, 
SpiceJet Customer Services. 

Toll Free : 1800-180-3333 
Mobile    : 0987-180-3333. 
Fax No.   : 0124-3913853. 
Email     :custrelations@spicejet.com 
Website   : http://www.spicejet.com
